𝐒𝐘𝐍𝐎𝐏𝐒𝐈𝐒

⭑ As Mikey's mischievous grin greeted you in the dead of night, a surge of adrenaline mingled with weariness coursed through your veins. His impromptu invitation hung in the air, tempting yet daunting. With a knowing look, you yielded to the call of adventure, conceding to the thrill of the unknown that awaited beyond the city's streets. Stepping out into the darkness, you embraced the uncertainty of the nocturnal journey ahead, trusting in the camaraderie of friendship to guide you through the shadows of the night.

✧ .   .   .   .  ──────────
